news.title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
news.summary: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.

news.title: Fragile quiet in Lebanon as US-Iran truce leaves unanswered questions

news.summary: Robert Kuzovkov, who used the pseudonym Semyon Skrepetsky, has been known for his caricatures of politicians including Vladimir Putin.

news.title: German broadcaster removes TV intro after Elon Musk takes legal action
news.summary: ZDF TV responded to a "cease and desist" letter after the tech trillionaire condemned the broadcaster's "outrageous lies".

news.summary: Police have arrested nine people and rescued more than 400 cats destined for slaughter, with more than 40 reunited with their owners.

news.title: Somaliland president visits Israeli Knesset on tour

news.title: Iraqi soccer fans celebrate end of 40-year World Cup drought

news.title: In Albania, anger grows against the government for supporting a Kushner-linked luxury resort

news.summary: The moves to the federal departments of Health and Human Services and Justice, respectively, would further dismantle an agency that President Donald Trump has vowed to close.

news.title: 'The Lost Founder' profiles a brilliant lawyer who helped craft the Constitution

news.title: Live with a partner? You may be sharing more microbes than you think
news.summary: A large study finds you may share about a quarter of your oral and gut microbes with the people you live with. Should you worry? We asked the experts.

news.title: The World Cup reminds us that the way to a visitor's heart ... is through their stomach
